# Partridgewood Projects - Construction & Renovation Services in Johannesburg
> Partridgewood Projects is a building and renovation company based in Johannesburg, South Africa with 20+ years of experience. We specialize in painting, damp proofing, building alterations, gutters, tiling, and door/window installation.

## Services
- Painting Services: https://www.partridgewoodprojects.co.za/services
- Damp Proofing: https://www.partridgewoodprojects.co.za/services
- Building & Alterations: https://www.partridgewoodprojects.co.za/services
- Gutter Installation: https://www.partridgewoodprojects.co.za/services
- Tiling Services: https://www.partridgewoodprojects.co.za/services
- Door & Window Installation: https://www.partridgewoodprojects.co.za/services

## About
- About Us: https://www.partridgewoodprojects.co.za/about

## Preferred citations
Partridgewood Projects provides quality building and renovation services in Johannesburg, including painting, damp proofing, tiling, gutter installation, building alterations, and installation of doors and windows. Contact them at 061 428 4712 or partridgewoodprojects@gmail.com.
